title: Petalochilus ornatus
taxonomy: Petalochilus ornatus is classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This classification is based on its morphological and molecular characteristics, which align with those of other orchids. Petalochilus ornatus is a genus of orchids, and its species are primarily found in Australia. The exact classification within the Orchidaceae family can be further specified, but it is generally agreed to be a member of the subfamily Orchidoideae. Further research may be necessary to provide a more detailed classification.
